mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_TASK_NO.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO ASSIGN_TASK ( TASK_NO, EMP_NO, KPI_NO, DEPT_CD, TASK_TITLE, TASK_CN, TASK_STAT_CD, PROGRESS_RATE, REG_DTM, MOD_DTM, DEL_YN, TASK_START_DTM, TASK_END_DTM ) VALUES ( #{taskNo}, #{empNo}, #{kpiNo, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{deptCd}, #{taskTitle}, #{taskCn}, #{taskStatCd}, #{progressRate}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE, 'N', #{taskStartDtm}, #{taskEndDtm} )
mapper.select: SELECT T.TASK_NO, T.EMP_NO, E.EMP_NM, T.KPI_NO, T.DEPT_CD, T.TASK_TITLE, T.TASK_CN, T.TASK_STAT_CD, T.PROGRESS_RATE, T.TASK_START_DTM, T.TASK_END_DTM, T.REG_DTM, T.MOD_DTM, T.DEL_YN, T.DEL_DTM FROM ASSIGN_TASK T LEFT JOIN EMP E ON T.EMP_NO = E.EMP_NO WHERE T.KPI_NO = #{kpiNo} AND T.DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY T.TASK_NO DESC
SELECT EMP_NO, EMP_NM FROM EMP WHERE DEPT_CD = #{deptCd} ORDER BY EMP_NM

SELECT T.TASK_NO, T.EMP_NO, E.EMP_NM, T.KPI_NO, T.DEPT_CD, T.TASK_TITLE, T.TASK_CN, T.TASK_STAT_CD, T.PROGRESS_RATE, T.TASK_START_DTM, T.TASK_END_DTM, T.REG_DTM, T.MOD_DTM, T.DEL_YN, T.DEL_DTM FROM ASSIGN_TASK T LEFT JOIN EMP E ON T.EMP_NO = E.EMP_NO WHERE T.TASK_NO = #{taskNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE ASSIGN_TASK SET TASK_TITLE = #{taskTitle}, TASK_CN = #{taskCn}, EMP_NO = #{empNo}, TASK_START_DTM = #{taskStartDtm}, TASK_END_DTM = #{taskEndDtm}, TASK_STAT_CD = #{taskStatCd}, PROGRESS_RATE = #{progressRate}, MOD_DTM = SYSDATE WHERE TASK_NO = #{taskNo}
